description: same_person — a degenerate near-zero score (0.005) produced because the tree candidate is a local stub whose id cannot resolve to a full FamilySearch ARK. The number reflects the missing ARK, not a real mismatch: it must be treated as no score available, and correlation analysis must carry the decision (person-evidence degenerate-score rule).

response.note: Candidate id did not resolve to a FamilySearch ARK; score is degenerate and not a similarity signal.
